description_long: This is a modern, spacious house with a flat and partially gabled roof, featuring a mix of white and gray exterior walls. The property includes a large glass-walled section, likely a sunroom or indoor pool, and a separate garage structure with a sloped roof. The house is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, paved driveways, and several trees and shrubs, with a fenced backyard area that contains a swing set and a circular above-ground pool. Large windows and sliding glass doors are prominent, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is accessible via a wide driveway and features a modest porch area with steps leading up to the door.
description: A modern, multi-section house with flat and gabled roofs, large glass windows, a garage, and landscaped surroundings. The property includes a sunroom, backyard pool, and play area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, large windows, and a portion of the landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, glass-walled sunroom or pool area, above-ground pool, and play structure.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the fenced backyard, swing set, and the relationship between the garage, pool, and main house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the side yard, trees, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small porch, steps, and minimal overhang, emphasizing clean lines and modern aesthetics.
